title: Critrical cPanel flaw mass-exploited in "Sorry" ransomware attacks
description: A new disclosed cPanel flaw tracked as CVE-2026-41940 is being mass-exploited to breach websites and encrypt data in "Sorry" ransomware attacks. [...]
author: Lawrence Abrams

title: ConsentFix v3 attacks target Azure with automated OAuth abuse
description: A new attack type, dubbed ConsentFix v3, has been circulating on hacker forums, building on the previous technique by adding automation and scaling potential. [...]
author: Bill Toulas
